service_type.description: Service type. Valid values: coordinator or worker. This field is used by dscli and is not passed to the service process.

coordinator_address.description: Address of coordinator in 'host:port' format (e.g., "127.0.0.1:31511"). The value cannot be empty.

coordinator_rpc_stub_cache_size.description: Maximum coordinator RPC stub cache size.

watch_event_dispatch_thread.description: Number of coordinator watch event dispatch threads.

rpc_thread_num.description: Config rpc server thread number, must be great equal than 0.

log_dir.description: If specified, logfiles are written into this directory instead of the default logging directory.

log_filename.description: Prefix of log filename, default is program invocation short name. Use standard characters only.

minloglevel.description: Messages below this level are not logged.

log_async_queue_size.description: Size of async logger's message queue.

max_log_size.description: Approx. maximum log file size (in MB). A value of 0 will be silently overridden to 1.

max_log_file_num.description: Maximum number of log files to retain per severity level. If set to 0, the log num is not limited.

log_retention_day.description: If greater than 0, log files older than this many days will be removed. If equal 0, log files are not removed by time.

log_async.description: Enable asynchronous writing to log files.

log_compress.description: Compress old log files in .gz format when generated log size exceeds max_log_size.

logbufsecs.description: Buffer log messages for at most this many seconds.

log_only_write_info_file.description: The INFO log file always receives all severities. When true, do not create additional WARNING/ERROR log files.

request_sample_rate.description: Sample rate for request logs (0.0-1.0). Default 1.0 means all request logs are sampled.

access_sample_rate.description: Sample rate for access logs (0.0-1.0). Default 1.0 means all access logs are sampled.

diagnostic_sample_rate.description: Sample rate for diagnostic logs (0.0-1.0). Default 1.0 means all diagnostic logs are sampled.
